description: PowerShell executed from a user temporary directory with execution policy bypass and no profile options.
detection_logic: event_id=4104 AND process=powershell.exe AND command contains '-ExecutionPolicy Bypass' AND command contains '\AppData\Local\Temp\'

command: 15 failed interactive logon attempts for user asmith from 10.20.14.55
description: Multiple failed logon events were observed against a domain user account from the same source address within a short time window.
detection_logic: event_id=4625 AND failed_logon_count >= 10 WITHIN 10m GROUP BY user, source_ip

alert_name: Distributed Password Spray Against Domain Accounts
command: Failed logons for 48 users from 10.30.7.21 using common workstation logon type
description: A single source generated failed authentication attempts across many user accounts, consistent with password spraying behavior.
detection_logic: event_id=4625 AND distinct_users >= 25 AND failures_per_user <= 3 WITHIN 30m GROUP BY source_ip

description: A new local user account was created on a server using the command line.
detection_logic: event_id=4720 OR command matches 'net user * /add'

alert_name: Scheduled Task Created From Command Line
description: A scheduled task was created to run an executable from ProgramData on a recurring interval.
detection_logic: event_id IN (4698,1) AND process=schtasks.exe AND command contains '/create' AND command contains 'ProgramData'

alert_name: New Service Installed With Suspicious Binary Path
command: Service Name: WinUpdateSvc; Binary Path: C:\Users\Public\update.exe
description: A Windows service was installed with a binary path located in a user-writable directory.
detection_logic: event_id=7045 AND service_binary_path contains 'C:\Users\Public\'

description: A workstation executed multiple network discovery commands in sequence.
detection_logic: event_id=1 AND process=cmd.exe AND command contains_any ('ipconfig /all','net view','nltest /dclist')

description: A domain user enumeration command was executed from a workstation.
detection_logic: event_id=1 AND process=net.exe AND command contains 'user /domain'

description: A command was run to enumerate membership of a privileged domain group.
detection_logic: process=net.exe AND command contains 'group' AND command contains '/domain'

description: Microsoft Defender detected execution of a known credential dumping utility on an endpoint.
detection_logic: event_id=1116 AND threat_name contains 'Mimikatz' OR process=mimikatz.exe

alert_name: LSASS Process Access From Non-System Process
description: A non-standard process attempted to access LSASS memory and write a dump file to disk.
detection_logic: event_id=10 AND target_process=lsass.exe AND source_process NOT IN ('lsass.exe','csrss.exe','wininit.exe')

description: CrowdStrike observed PowerShell launched with hidden window and encoded command arguments.
detection_logic: process=powershell.exe AND command contains_any ('-EncodedCommand','-enc') AND command contains '-W Hidden'

command: Successful RDP logon type 10 from 203.0.113.77 outside normal geography
description: A successful remote interactive logon occurred from a source not previously seen for this user.
detection_logic: event_id=4624 AND logon_type=10 AND source_ip NOT IN user_baseline_locations

command: wmic.exe /node:WIN-SRV-025 process call create 'cmd.exe /c whoami > C:\Windows\Temp\out.txt'
description: WMI was used to create a remote process on another Windows server.
detection_logic: event_id=4688 AND process=wmic.exe AND command contains '/node:' AND command contains 'process call create'

description: A Run key was modified to launch an executable from a user profile at logon.
detection_logic: event_id=13 AND registry_path contains '\CurrentVersion\Run' AND registry_value_data contains '\AppData\Roaming\'

description: SentinelOne detected remote command execution over SMB using administrative credentials.
detection_logic: process=psexec.exe AND command contains '\\' AND command contains 'cmd.exe /c'

command: Repeated DNS queries for high-entropy subdomains under update-check.example.net
description: The host generated a large number of long, high-entropy DNS queries to a single domain.
detection_logic: event_id=22 AND dns_query_length > 60 AND unique_subdomains >= 100 WITHIN 15m

command: updater.exe connected to 198.51.100.24:443 every 60 seconds for 2 hours
description: Endpoint network telemetry showed regular outbound connections at a fixed interval to the same external destination.
detection_logic: destination_ip NOT IN corporate_ranges AND connection_interval_variance < 5s AND duration >= 1h

description: Microsoft Word spawned a command shell that launched hidden PowerShell.
detection_logic: parent_process=WINWORD.EXE AND process=cmd.exe AND command contains 'powershell.exe'

description: A registry policy associated with elevated Windows Installer execution was modified.
detection_logic: registry_path contains '\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\Installer' AND registry_value_name='AlwaysInstallElevated' AND registry_value_data='1'
